rows.definition: idxPlan is the local ctxplan.Plan produced by index.PlanCells in cmd/ctxplandemo and cmd/ctxplanbench, the O(1) resident view scored over only an index-bounded candidate set rather than the full transcript.
rows.distinction: It is one concrete materialized resident view returned by PlanCells, NOT the PlanCells selection primitive itself nor the agent.Planner client that drives a model.

rows.definition: ctxplan.Audit(p Plan) returns the Witness that a planned resident view is faithful (no candidate span destroyed), the same plan-faithfulness check tools/plan_audit_test.py exercises.
rows.distinction: It judges whether an already-built resident Plan is recoverable, NOT how the Plan's cells are selected (PlanCells) nor how layout is laid down (PlanLayout).

rows.definition: syspromptmmu.PlanOf folds a base Segment list into the []cachemeta.PromptSegment system-prompt plan that BuildSystemValue realizes, and BaseContextPlan seeds the resident spine-plus-policy floor of that plan.
rows.distinction: It plans the cacheable SYSTEM-PROMPT prefix segments, NOT the per-turn history resident view (ctxplan PlanCells) nor a routed model roster.

rows.definition: compute.AutoSizeContextPlan takes a ContextSizeConfig and a MemoryPlan weight set plus available bytes and returns the auto-sized context token budget and the fitted MemoryPlan for a serve.
rows.distinction: It SIZES a compute MemoryPlan against host headroom, NOT a ctxplan resident view of conversation history nor a routed model plan.

rows.definition: internal/compute/vulkan_plan.go is the host-tractable scaffold for issue #10's Vulkan command-buffer wiring, the compute-side plan of which cold weights spill on a discrete GPU.
rows.distinction: It is a GPU compute/command-buffer plan, NOT a ctxplan conversation resident view nor a compute MemoryPlan headroom fit.

rows.definition: ExpertParallelPlan(numExperts, ranks) is the named GLM-5.2 expert-parallel partition that splits the Mixture-of-Experts experts across ranks, per docs/notes/GLM52-EXPERT-PARALLEL-MULTIGPU.
rows.distinction: It plans how MoE experts are sharded across GPU ranks, NOT a host-RAM compute MemoryPlan nor a conversation resident view.

rows.definition: internal/agenttest's ScriptedPlanner is a deterministic agent.Planner test fixture that emits a fixed sequence of turns, built by NewScriptedPlanner and used by RunSession.
rows.distinction: It is an in-test scripted planner, NOT the offline MockPlanner production fallback nor a live network HTTPPlanner.

rows.definition: internal/agenttest's ReplayPlanner is a deterministic agent.Planner that re-emits the assistant turns of a recorded transcript, built by NewReplayPlanner.
rows.distinction: It replays a captured transcript deterministically, NOT a fresh scripted sequence (ScriptedPlanner) nor a live model call.

rows.definition: agent.NewInKernelPlanner builds the in-kernel agent.Planner that decodes a local GGUF model in-process (used by run_model.go and the gateway's --gguf in-kernel generation path).
rows.distinction: It constructs the LOCAL in-process generation planner, NOT the outbound network HTTPPlanner nor an offline test planner.

rows.definition: internal/agent/chat.go's plannerTimeout is the per-request upstream-model HTTP timeout (60s default, FAK_PLANNER_TIMEOUT_S override, clamped to [5,3600]), and plannerMaxAttempts is the total upstream try count for that same path.
rows.distinction: It is the timeout/retry config of a network planner's HTTP call, NOT a planner implementation like the in-kernel or HTTP planner.

rows.definition: internal/maturity.BuildIssuePlan decides whether each maturity item creates a new GitHub issue or updates an existing one, and SyncIssuePlan applies that planned create/update set via gh.
rows.distinction: It plans GitHub-issue create-vs-update for maturity items, NOT a conversation resident view nor an action-item BuildPlan.

rows.definition: internal/taskmgr.BuildHandoffIssuePlan decides create vs update for every next step of a Handoff, emitting HandoffIssuePlanRow rows that syncTaskHandoffPlan applies via gh.
rows.distinction: It plans handoff next-step issues from a taskmgr Handoff, distinct from maturity's BuildIssuePlan and from a generic action-item BuildPlan.

rows.definition: PlanRow is the one-issue create/update decision struct emitted by BuildPlan in internal/dogfoodissues and internal/learningdebt (and guardcomplaint.PlanRow), one row per ActionItem or Defect.
rows.distinction: It is a single row of a GitHub-issue sync plan, NOT the whole BuildPlan that produces the slice nor a ctxplan resident view.

rows.definition: internal/loopdrive.PlanItem is one parsed step of a loop-drive goal plan (produced by parsePlan), carrying the Text the loop drives toward turn by turn.
rows.distinction: It is a single step of a fak-loop goal plan, NOT a ctxplan resident-view cell nor an issue-sync PlanRow.

rows.definition: internal/vcachescore.PlanIndex chooses the smallest hot-anchor index reaching a target coverage from a vcachecal.Concentration, returning an IndexPlan.
rows.distinction: It plans a value-cache hot-anchor index size, NOT loopdrive's goal-step index nor a ctxplan resident view.

rows.definition: internal/benchpost folds a bench_plan.py --json payload into a run-request Post via RequestFromPlan, with LoadPlan/ParsePlan decoding the payload and formatPlanRow rendering each planRow.
rows.distinction: It plans benchmark RUN REQUESTS from a bench_plan payload, NOT a ctxplan resident view nor loopdrive's ParsePlan goal steps.

rows.definition: internal/modelroute's Roster.ResolvePlan and Registry.ResolvePlan bind every member of a routed Plan (the optional Scout plus the roster) to concrete resolved targets, producing a ResolvedPlan.
rows.distinction: It resolves a routed model Plan into concrete model targets, NOT a ctxplan resident view nor an issue-sync plan.

rows.definition: internal/accounts.Registry.RotationPlan classifies every home and returns the rotation pool of eligible seats with its policy, driving account/seat rotation.
rows.distinction: It plans which account SEATS rotate, NOT a routed model plan (ResolvedPlan) nor a conversation resident view.

rows.definition: loopindex.StagePlan is the named loop-index stage whose signal is collision-priced fan-out coverage with a fitness floor, used in cmd/fak/loopindex.go.
rows.distinction: It names a maturity/loop-index STAGE, NOT a ctxplan resident view nor an issue-sync PlanRow.

rows.definition: internal/engine.PlanPlacementForHost (and PlanPlacementForDeviceAndHost) plans a cachemeta placement against the host that actually exists, the host-DRAM-pressure half of issue #1073's wire.
rows.distinction: It plans KV/cache PLACEMENT on host vs device, distinct from the compute MemoryPlan host-fit refusals and from a conversation resident view.

rows.definition: internal/compute.RefuseHostScopedPlanIfTooBigForHost is the --cpu-offload-experts counterpart of RefuseMemoryPlanIfTooBigForHost: on a device serve with cpu-offloaded MoE it refuses a MemoryPlan that will not fit host RAM (#974, #971).
rows.distinction: It refuses only the HOST-SCOPED slice of a MemoryPlan on an offloaded serve, where RefuseMemoryPlanIfTooBigForHost refuses the whole no-backend host plan.

rows.definition: internal/ctxplan's CandidateBound is the index-bounded candidate-set size c the Planned regime priced each turn, defaulting to DefaultMaxCandidates and feeding IndexBoundedPlannerCompute.
rows.distinction: It bounds how many Candidate spans the planner scores per turn, NOT the Candidate input itself nor the MaxCandidates probe knob.

rows.definition: gateway.KVPressureCandidate is a wire-neutral KV span the post-turn pressure relief may evict, supplied by a KVPressureCandidateProvider and lowered into engine.CapacityPressureCandidate.
rows.distinction: It is the gateway-side evict candidate for KV pressure relief, NOT a ctxplan resident-view Candidate span nor the engine-side lowered form.

rows.definition: internal/compute.PrewarmCandidate is one tool-call boundary the scheduler decides about for tool-latency prewarm admission (DecidePrewarmAdmission), carrying the WarmPoolFree pollution gate.
rows.distinction: It is the prewarm admission input boundary, NOT a KV-pressure evict candidate nor a ctxplan resident-view Candidate span.

rows.definition: internal/dojocal.RankCandidates orders dojo recalibration candidates by candidatePriority, and NextCandidate returns the top-ranked scored candidate for the next tick.
rows.distinction: It ranks DOJO recalibration candidates by kind priority, NOT ctxplan resident-view Candidate spans nor KV-pressure evict candidates.

rows.definition: candidateIDLabel is the bench-harness helper (cmd/terminalbench, browseractionbench, toolsandboxbench) that pluralizes the count of CandidateTaskIDs in a TaskSelection for the tasks status line.
rows.distinction: It labels how many candidate TASK IDs a bench selected, NOT a ctxplan resident-view Candidate span nor a scored recalibration candidate.

rows.definition: internal/releasestatus's candidateTag/candidateSHA name the latest rolling tag (and its commit) being evaluated for stable promotion, with no_candidate the state when no rolling tag exists.
rows.distinction: It is a RELEASE promotion candidate tag/sha, NOT a ctxplan Candidate span nor a KV-pressure evict candidate.
